data.name: Alpha Hole Prison - A Yaoi, Gay, Bara Visual Novel
data.detailed_description:
A Gay Prison Visual Novel Dating Sim! Earthling Miguel Santos has been sentenced to life at Alpha Hole, a notorious space prison. His survival depends on using his charms to convince a powerful ally to protect him. A gigantic seven route hardcore gay dating sim loaded with animated scenes!



  • A Dynamic Visual Novel Dating Sim of 300,000 Words!
  • 6 Super-Sexy Adults-Only Routes
  • 135 Animated Sex Scenes!
  • Threesome Options in Every Route!
  • 75 Endings, Including Demo Endings
  • 400+ Gorgeous CGs
  • An Intricate 'All Choices Matter' Stats System
  • Partial Voice Acting
  • Pressing 'v' on your keyboard activates AutoVoice, and will have all game text read out loud to you
  • All Love Interests Versatile!
  • 24 Exclusive Music Tracks


Partial voice acting by Pyreprince (Chihuahua in Mister Versatile)


Partial voice acting by Kiba Walker (Camp Buddy, Full Service, Mister Versatile, Morningdew Farms, and To Trust an Incubus)


Partial voice acting by Sean Chiplock (Full Service, To Trust an Incubus, Spiderman: Miles Morales, The Last of Us II)


Partial voice acting by Khristopher Padua


Patial voice acting by Sean Chiplock (Mornindew Farms, Mister Versatile, One Punch Man, Persona 5, Demon Slayer)


Partial voice acting by Nathan Matthews (To Trust an Incubus, The Yaoikuza)


Partial voice acting by Bryce Chadwell (Morningdew Farms)


Partial voice acting by L. Alphonso


Partial voice acting by Khristopher Padua

Other voices include Steve 'Warky' Nunez as Johan (Camp Buddy, Full Service, To Trust an Incubus, Mornindew Farms, Ishida and Asakura), Cole Feuchter, Preston Cowley, Reece Bridger, Riley Moore, Ryan Hoyle, Terrance Drye, and Steven Aries.

data.short_description: A Gay Prison Visual Novel Dating Sim! Earthling Miguel Santos has been sentenced to life at Alpha Hole, a notorious space prison. His survival depends on using his charms to convince a powerful ally to protect him. A gigantic seven route hardcore gay dating sim loaded with animated scenes!
data.reviews:
“How come AHP gets better with each and every Beta update? I’m really at a loss of words here. The storyline is so complex, well written, and our “little” cannibal is way more enchanting than I ever dared to hope.”
J. Olbrich

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP System Pack 1
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.6+
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Linux x86/x86_64
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
